creator: reindeer.ai

evidence.text: GenAI has given the world two big capabilities: conversational intelligence and code generation. Fusing them together finally makes them work, but until now they've mostly lived in separate products. Reindeer's agents collect feedback through conversations and SME corrections in the inner loop. The hard part is not collecting that feedback. It's deciding which signals justify rewriting the agent and which are noise. That judgment feeds a code-gen layer where the agent modifies its own context, tests, validates, and proposes new policy branches to the agent manager. title: One Agent, Two Loops: Why Reindeer Gets Into Production
